events.label: assistant
events.text: Written to `/app/answer.json`. The key issue is that the system was already treated with aftermarket stop-leak before this visit — that's a compliance/safety red flag under EPA 609 (risk of clogging metering devices/driers and contaminating recovery equipment), so it fails as installed-defective/non-compliant until sealant screening and proper remediation occur.
